title: Google Dorking 🔍
description: Using Google to find hidden files and secrets.

slides.title: Advanced Search 🔍
slides.content:
### What is Dorking?

Google doesn't just index text; it indexes files, servers, and sometimes even passwords! **Google Dorking** is using advanced search operators to find things that shouldn't be public.

slides.title: Common Operators ⌨️
slides.content: Try these in a Google search bar:
slides.codeSnippet:
site:example.com filetype:pdf (Finds all PDFs on a site)
intitle:"index of" (Finds exposed file directories)
inurl:admin (Finds login pages)

quizData.question: Which Google operator would you use to find specific file types (like .xlsx) on a website?
quizData.explanation: 'filetype:' filters search results to only show specific extensions.
